original_hypothesis.title: BlastOnboardingBoot ready Flag Can Be Toggled to Disrupt Claiming and Swap Staking Contracts
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: setReady() can toggle the ready flag between true and false. setStaking() is only blocked when ready=true. A malicious or compromised owner can: (1) setReady(true) → users claim to staking contract A, (2) setReady(false) → setStaking(B) to new contract, (3) setReady(true) → remaining users claim to staking contract B. Early claimers are in contract A with no rewards; late claimers in contract B.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The ready flag should be monotonically true once set. Its reversibility allows splitting users across different staking contracts, potentially stranding early claimers' funds with no reward streams.

proof_of_signal.pattern: setReady(bool _ready) allows toggling; setStaking blocked only when ready=true; no one-way enforcement

preconditions: Owner key compromised or malicious owner action
Some users have already claimed to original staking contract
Owner toggles ready and swaps staking contract

initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Early claimers lose access to reward streams; their LP is stranded

economic_questions: What is the total LP value at stake during claiming?
Can early claimers unstake from contract A and restake to B?
Is the staking contract's withdrawal permissionless?
validation_requirements: Verify early claimers are in different staking contract than late claimers
Check if early claimers can withdraw and move to new staking

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: Early claimers' LP share value if rewards redirected
preliminary_attack_economics.estimated_profit_margin: Full reward stream value for stranded users

market_conditions_analysis.market_impact_assessment: Split user base across staking contracts

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: Early claimers staked to original contract
potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: Lost reward streams on staked LP
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: Total LP shares claimed before staking swap

investigation_priorities.parameter_analysis: Can LockingMultiRewards withdrawals bypass operator locks?
investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Verify state transitions allow ready toggling

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
